jd_text: Digital Growth & Partnerships Manager 🚀 We’re Hiring: Digital Growth & Partnerships Manager 📍 Dubai, UAE (Global Role) Are you someone who knows how to turn content, communities, and partnerships into real business growth? We’re looking for a Digital Growth & Partnerships Manager to help us scale our global presence in the fintech / trading space. 🔥 What You’ll Do Build and scale high-impact partnerships with influencers, affiliates, and trading communities Identify and onboard content creators and digital partners across YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, X (Twitter), and LinkedIn Drive client acquisition through non-traditional channels Launch and manage co-branded campaigns and growth initiatives Work closely with marketing & sales teams to convert traffic into revenue Track and optimize performance metrics (CPA, ROI, conversions) 🎯 What We’re Looking For 5+ years experience in digital marketing, partnerships, or growth roles Strong understanding of social media ecosystems & audience behavior Proven track record in influencer or community-led growth Experience working with external partners, affiliates, or creators Commercial mindset focused on results, conversions, and ROI Experience in forex, trading, or fintech is a big plus Existing network in trading / finance / creator ecosystem is highly preferred 💡 Why Join Us? Work in a fast-growing global fintech environment Build and own a scalable growth engine High-impact role with real business visibility
